MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-21-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alexander Volchegursky of Lvovich & Volchegursky LLP (392.2560) for plaintiffs and moving parties. No other appearances. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFFS CARMEN ROSA ALUY LAU AND ROSA ALUY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
